steps.title: Identify the structural clue
steps.content: The colon after “set challenges:” signals that examples of those challenges will follow.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content:
The underlined sentences provide specific examples of the mental exercises the narrator creates at night, illustrating what she thinks about during her nighttime rehearsal. A, C, and D introduce content not present in the underlined portion (telephone number, actual directions, and the mother, respectively).

That matches choice B — B is correct.
